articles.title: The Nike Vomero Plus "Cheat Day" Stains Its Khaki Upper With a Cheeto-Dusted Orange Fade

articles.title: 6 Blokecore Collaborations We Loved During the 2026 FIFA World Cup
articles.summary: While the final whistle of the 2026 FIFA World Cup blew on July 19, the tournament’s impact is far from over. This year’s competition served as the ultimate catalyst for cross-sector collaborations that embraced blokecore, novelty, and nostalgia. articles.title: PUMA and The Whitaker Group's New Platform Is Bigger Than Sneakers
articles.summary: PUMA and The Whitaker Group are expanding their long-running partnership with the launch of CODA, a new multi-season storytelling platform that looks beyond product to explore how culture is inherited, reimagined and ultimately pushed forward.Named after the concluding passage of a musical composition, CODA reframes the term as the moment between an ending and a new beginning. It's that transitional space where ideas, movements, and cultural touchstones are passed from one generation to the next, only to be challenged, reshaped and transformed into something entirely new.The platform debuts with a teaser film establishing the tone for what PUMA and The Whitaker Group describe as an ongoing exploration of sport, style, design, and community. Future chapters will spotlight creators, artists

articles.title: India’s Apparel Exports: Building on Strength, Closing the Gaps
articles.summary: The global apparel sourcing map is being redrawn. India’s place on it is more complicated, and more promising, than it appears. Across the five categories tracked in this analysis, India’s apparel exports grew 3% yearon-year in 2025, from US $9.44 billion to US $9.72 billion. Bangladesh grew far faster at 10.1%, reaching US $31.92 billion, […] The post India’s Apparel Exports: Building on Strength, Closing the Gaps appeared first on Apparel Resources .

articles.title: This PlayStation 1 Keepsake Ornament Fires Up the Console's Iconic Startup Sound at the Press of a Button
articles.summary: Hallmark has added the PlayStation Console Ornament With Light and Sound to its 2026 Keepsake collection, turning the original PlayStation into a palm-sized Christmas ornament that does more than hang from a branch. Designed by artist Orville Wilson, the piece recreates Sony's landmark console and its accompanying controller in miniature, with a working power button that lights up the unit and plays the PS1's signature startup sequence.The ornament measures 4 inches wide, 3.75 inches tall, and 1.5 inches deep, placing it in the mid-range of Hallmark's Keepsake lineup in terms of physical footprint. The shoe pairs a leather and synthetic leather upper with detachable kilties, repositioning the familiar low-cut frame as a platform for modular design.The upper splits its construction between leather and synthetic leather panels, creating a tonal interplay across the Light Orewood Brown base, Black accents, Steam mid-tones, and White overlays. articles.title: Kylian Mbappé Wins 2026 FIFA World Cup Golden Boot Over Lionel Messi
articles.summary: Summary Kylian Mbappé won his second consecutive FIFA World Cup Golden Boot by finishing the 2026 tournament with 10 goalsLionel Messi finished second in the scoring race with eight goals after going goalless in Argentina's final loss to SpainThe French forward also established a new tournament record by reaching 22 all-time career World Cup goals FIFA has officially awarded the 2026 FIFA World Cup Golden Boot to French superstar Kylian Mbappé following the conclusion of the tournament. The 27-year-old forward secured his second consecutive scoring title by finishing with 10 goals, edging out rival Lionel Messi.Mbappé solidified his lead by netting two goals during France's 6-4 third-place playoff against England, bringing his total to 10 goals alongside four assists. articles.title: New Balance 1890A Receives a “Dark Night” Variant
articles.summary: Name: New Balance 1890A “Dark Night”Colorway: “Dark Night”SKU: U18905JKMSRP: $190 USDRelease Date: August 6Where to Buy: New BalanceNew Balance expands on its 1890A lineup with “Dark Night” colorway. This progressive silhouette stands out through its distinctive apron upper and bound-edge U-shape across the forefoot, offering an elevated, formal twist on a traditional athletic profile. A moody hue drapes the shoe in a vampy palette characterized by deep, stealthy purple and blue tones. Its upper is expertly constructed with ventilated mesh underlays for optimal breathability, reinforced by sleek, tonal synthetic overlays that provide a dynamic, textural finish. articles.title: The Vans Skate Loafer 53 Crepe Disguises Skatepark Grip as 1950s Refinement
articles.summary: Name: Vans Skate Loafer 53 CrepeColorway: Brown, BlackSKU: VN000Z3QEMV, VN000Z3QFSTMSRP: TBCRelease Date: TBCThe Vans Skate Loafer 53 Crepe is the brand's latest entry in a growing lineage of shoes that refuse to pick a lane. Rooted in the clean, pared-back profile of a 1950s penny loafer, the silhouette re-emerges here with a full skate-specific toolkit underneath, blending vintage slip-on charm with the kind of reinforced construction Vans has spent decades engineering for the board.On the surface, the Skate Loafer 53 Crepe reads as almost deceptively simple. A suede upper provides a soft, textured finish across both the black and brown colorways, with leather reinforcement adding structure where the shoe needs it most.
